enabledCustomRules.description: Collection of Cloudflare custom rules that are currently enabled for the zone or host.

enabledRecommendedRulesets.description: Collection of Cloudflare recommended rulesets that are enabled for the zone or host.

zoneId.description: Cloudflare-assigned identifier for the DNS zone associated with the verified host (for example, the Cloudflare Zone ID). This ID is used to correlate verification details with the Cloudflare account and to perform configuration operations via the provider's API.
